summary: Complete testing of Letter Generation Modal auto-fill feature. All backend tests passed (4/4). All UI tests passed. The LetterFormModal correctly implements: (1) YOUR INFORMATION section with name/email pre-filled and LOCKED (gray background, readOnly=true), (2) RECIPIENT INFORMATION section with editable fields, (3) 'From your profile' hints under locked fields, (4) 'Detected by James from your document' hint under pre-filled Key amount, (5) Yellow incomplete profile banner with 'Complete profile' link, (6) autocomplete='off' on recipient name and address fields, (7) 'Generate letter with James' button works and generates legal letters.

1_login_dashboard.evidence: Login with test@jasper.legal / JasperPro2026! successful, redirects to /dashboard

2_generate_letter_button.evidence: Click 'Generate letter →' in Next Actions panel opens LetterFormModal (data-testid='letter-form-modal')

3_your_information_section.evidence: YOUR INFORMATION section present with 'Your full name', 'Your email', 'Your address' fields

4_name_prefilled_locked.evidence: Name field shows 'Alex Thompson', readOnly=true, backgroundColor=rgb(243, 244, 246) (gray)

6_from_your_profile_hint.evidence: Found 2 'From your profile' hints under name and email fields

7_address_editable.evidence: Address field is empty, readOnly=false, backgroundColor=rgb(250, 250, 250) (white/editable)

8_incomplete_profile_banner.evidence: Yellow banner visible: 'Complete your profile to never fill this again' with 'Complete profile →' button (data-testid='incomplete-profile-banner', 'complete-profile-btn')

9_recipient_information_section.evidence: RECIPIENT INFORMATION section present with Recipient name, Recipient address, Date of the document, Key amount fields

10_key_amount_prefilled.evidence: Key amount shows '$53,200' pre-filled from case.financial_exposure

11_detected_by_james_hint.evidence: Found 'Detected by James from your document' hint under Key amount field

12_autocomplete_off_recipient_fields.evidence: Recipient name: autocomplete='off', Recipient address: autocomplete='off'

13_generate_letter_button_works.evidence: Click 'Generate letter with James' shows 'James is writing...' then displays Letter Preview with Download PDF button

14_backend_case_model_fields.evidence: GET /api/cases/{case_id} returns opposing_party_name, opposing_party_address, document_date, primary_amount fields (all accessible, may be null)

15_backend_user_profile.evidence: Login response includes user.name='Alex Thompson', user.email='test@jasper.legal' for pre-fill

16_locked_field_prevents_typing.evidence: Interaction test: typing in locked name field does not change value (original='Alex Thompson', after typing='Alex Thompson')

critical_code_review_comments: LetterFormModal.js correctly implements auto-fill logic with locked/editable field distinction
Field component properly handles locked state with readOnly attribute and gray background (#f3f4f6)
Incomplete profile banner correctly appears when user has no address
autocomplete='off' correctly applied to recipient name and address inputs
Dashboard.js and CaseDetail.js correctly pass userName, userEmail, userAddress, caseData, onNavigate props to LetterFormModal
Backend Case model includes new fields: opposing_party_name, opposing_party_address, document_date, primary_amount
context_for_next_testing_agent: Letter Form Modal auto-fill feature fully tested. Test user (test@jasper.legal) has name='Alex Thompson' and email but NO address, so name/email are locked and address is editable. The yellow incomplete profile banner appears. For recipient info, existing cases don't have opposing_party_name yet (will be extracted on new analyses), but financial_exposure is used for Key amount. The 'Detected by James' hint only appears when the value is pre-filled. Letter generation works and produces legal letters with citations.
